[South-eastern Baltic] POLISH NAV WARN 120/26
SOUTHERN BALTIC.
DUE TO THE MILITARY EXERCISES (USE OF WEAPON) ALL SHIPS ARE REQUESTED TO AVOID AREA BOUNDED BY POSITIONS :

54-35.40N 016-08.77E
54-50.25N 015-56.44E
54-59.30N 016-39.00E
54-47.04N 016-46.38E
54-40.75N 016-16.95E

2026-05-25 TO 2026-05-29
FROM 03:00 TO 21:59 UTC

EXTREME CAUTION ADVISED.
CANCEL THIS MSG 292159 UTC MAY
